message:
Fix MVCC lifecycle, connection pragmas, batch compat, and JIT test stability

- lifecycle.rs: MVCC lifecycle improvements
- shm.rs: Shared memory handling fixes
- connection.rs: Use delta-based assertions instead of absolute-zero
  checks for JIT test stability in parallel test environments
- batch.rs: Batch compat layer improvements
- lib.rs: Top-level library changes
- e2e tests: Add backend_kind and backend_mode pragma assertions
- Cargo.lock: Add rusqlite dependency for e2e tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
